name: DPRK IT-worker operation
brief: DPRK operatives use AI-generated résumés/personas, AI profile photos, and real-time deepfake video to pass job interviews, and Claude to pass coding assessments and perform the work while fraudulently employed, funneling wages to the regime. CrowdStrike (FAMOUS CHOLLIMA) tracked 320+ infiltrated firms (+220% YoY); Microsoft names Jasper Sleet using the Faceswap app to insert workers' faces into stolen IDs; Anthropic confirmed Claude-enabled employment fraud; Amazon reported blocking 1,800+ suspected operatives in 2025.
